mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_schedule_run` ( `run_id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '运行ID', `run_no` varchar(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '运行编号', `trigger_type` varchar(32) NOT NULL COMMENT '触发类型', `stage` varchar(32) NOT NULL COMMENT '当前阶段', `status` varchar(16) NOT NULL COMMENT '运行状态', `model_provider` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模型提供方', `model_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模型名称', `week_start` date NOT NULL COMMENT '排班周开始日期', `week_end` date NOT NULL COMMENT '排班周结束日期', `perceived_doctor_count` int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '感知医生数', `perceived_dept_count` int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '感知科室数', `generated_count` int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '生成班次数', `inserted_count` int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '入库班次数', `fallback_count` int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '兜底次数', `warning_count` int DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '告警次数', `duration_ms` bigint DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '运行耗时毫秒', `perception_summary` text COMMENT '感知摘要', `reasoning_summary` text COMMENT '推理摘要', `action_summary` text COMMENT '执行摘要', `warning_summary` text COMMENT '告警摘要', `error_message` text COMMENT '异常信息', `start_time` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT '开始时间', `end_time` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结束时间', PRIMARY KEY (`run_id`), UNIQUE KEY `uk_agent_schedule_run_no` (`run_no`), KEY `idx_agent_schedule_run_week` (`week_start`, `week_end`), KEY `idx_agent_schedule_run_status` (`status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='智能体排班运行记录表'
mapper.insert: insert into agent_schedule_run (run_no, trigger_type, stage, status, model_provider, model_name, week_start, week_end, perceived_doctor_count, perceived_dept_count, generated_count, inserted_count, fallback_count, warning_count, duration_ms, perception_summary, reasoning_summary, action_summary, warning_summary, error_message, start_time, end_time) values (#{runNo}, #{triggerType}, #{stage}, #{status}, #{modelProvider}, #{modelName}, #{weekStart}, #{weekEnd}, #{perceivedDoctorCount}, #{perceivedDeptCount}, #{generatedCount}, #{insertedCount}, #{fallbackCount}, #{warningCount}, #{durationMs}, #{perceptionSummary}, #{reasoningSummary}, #{actionSummary}, #{warningSummary}, #{errorMessage}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.select: select * from agent_schedule_run order by start_time desc, run_id desc limit 1
select * from agent_schedule_run order by start_time desc, run_id desc limit 20
